title: UPSSSC – Excise Constable – 722 Posts
shortInfo: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 722 UP Excise Constable posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official UPSSSC website. The last date to submit the application form is 24-06-2026.

how_to_apply: Application Mode: Online only through the official website https://upsssc.gov.in
